title: Purple Nebula Bloom Theme
implementationSurface: Purple theme CSS tokens plus token regression tests

included: purple-mode nav and footer visual tokens
purple-mode file list, upload, dialog, preview, and settings glass tokens
excluded: layout, spacing, sizing, routing, props, store, or persistence changes

assumptions: The request targets the existing purple mode.
Token-only color, gradient, border, opacity, and shadow changes are allowed.
Existing component CSS remains the layout authority.
risks: Dreamier nebula fields can reduce contrast if surface opacity is too bright.
Large token blocks can unintentionally affect multiple UI surfaces.
Fluid sizing governance must remain unchanged and passing.
